rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` at Deck.lean:73 implicitly relies on the default simp set (notably `Set.mem_singleton_iff` is unlisted), and recommends `simp only` with all lemmas explicit — a real, maintainer-enforced proof-quality standard in Mathlib-style projects. Review 1 misses this and incorrectly approves.
